speaker: speaker1
text: Did you read the letter in the paper about smoking ? The person who wrote that must be crazy .

speaker: speaker2
text: I don ’ t think so . I think the government should do everything it can to discourage people from smoking .

speaker: speaker1
text: Maybe so . But a law banning cigarettes will do no good .

speaker: speaker2
text: No , you can ’ t suddenly make smoking illegal , but government could prohibit smoking in public places like movies and theatres .
